name: Carrot 'n' Raisin Cheescake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, granulated sugar, ground nutmeg, and melted margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine softened cream cheese, granulated sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs and orange juice to the cream cheese mixture. Blend in thoroughly.
5. Stir in shredded carrots, raisins, ground ginger, and additional orange juice.
6. Pour the batter over the crust.
7. Bake at 450 degrees F for another 10 minutes. Reduce temperature to 250 degrees F and continue baking for an additional 55 minutes until set.
8. Remove from oven and let cool before removing the rim of the springform pan.
9. To make topping, combine remaining cream cheese with orange juice in a bowl. Add powdered sugar gradually, mixing until well combined.
10. Spread the mixture over the top of the cheesecake. Garnish with additional raisins and finely shredded carrots if desired. Chill before serving.
